# HSN Classifier MCP

> HSN code lookup (4,676 entries), free-text search, product-to-HSN classifier

This MCP server exposes 3 tools via the Model Context Protocol (JSON-RPC 2.0 over HTTP POST). It runs on Cloudflare Workers and is billed via Dodo Payments. Authenticated via `Authorization: Bearer <api_key>` obtained by subscribing at `https://hsn-classifier-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/upgrade`.

## Endpoint
- MCP JSON-RPC: https://hsn-classifier-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/mcp
- Health: https://hsn-classifier-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/health
- Landing page: https://hsn-classifier-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/
- Get API key: https://hsn-classifier-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/upgrade?tier=solo

## Tools
- `lookup_hsn`: Look up an HSN code (4/6/8-digit). Returns description + chapter.
- `search_hsn`: Free-text keyword search across HSN descriptions (default limit 10, max 50).
- `classify_product`: Classify a product name into the most likely HSN code with alternatives + matched tokens.

## Authentication
Pass `Authorization: Bearer <api_key>` on POST /mcp. Free tier: anonymous, 100 calls / month / IP.

## Pricing
- Free: 100 calls / month (anonymous, no signup)
- Solo $9/mo: 2,000 calls / month, 60/min
- Team $29/mo: 10,000 calls / month, 200/min, 5 team seats
- Pro $79/mo: 50,000 calls / month, 600/min, 25 team seats
Billed via Dodo Payments (merchant-of-record). Cancel anytime.

## Account management
- View account: GET https://hsn-classifier-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/account (Bearer)
- Rotate key: POST https://hsn-classifier-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/account/rotate (Bearer)
- GDPR data export: GET https://hsn-classifier-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/account/export (Bearer)
- Team management (Team+): https://hsn-classifier-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/account/team
